SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF W. RANDALL WONZER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CARRIE WONZER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUNPACIFIC PARTNERS LLC IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS MARTEEN DESCHAUMES. DEFENDANT MARTEEN DESCHAUMES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MANUEL OVALLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MILTON AVILA IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONZER, W. RANDALL WONZER, CARRIE L.
